title: Count Property
description: Gets the number of controls on a form.
notes: Use the Count property to determine the number of controls on a form. Then you can iterate through all the controls using the Controls property.
see_also:
Applies To

Controls
 Property

Type Property
examples:
Integer count
GSet frmMain.Controls.Count, count
For i = 1 To count GGet frmMain.Controls(i).Type, type$ If type$ = "Button" Then
   GSet frmMain.Controls(i).Enabled, False EndIf
Next i
